title: Add admin panel, analytics tracking, Indian domestic routes, and enhance Sarah AI chatbot

requirements.text: Add an 'Admin Panel' navigation button in the header that links to /admin route. The admin panel must require authentication using simple username/password credentials stored in the backend configuration. Use a single hardcoded admin account (do not use Internet Identity). Validate credentials through the backend before allowing access to the admin dashboard.

quotes: Add an Admin Panel button in the header navigation bar that links to /admin
Admin panel must require login
Use single admin credentials stored in backend configuration
Only one admin account is required for the system

acceptanceCriteria: Admin Panel button appears in header navigation
Clicking the button navigates to /admin route
Admin route is protected and requires authentication
Backend stores admin username/password in configuration
Admin credentials are not exposed in frontend code
Successful login grants access to admin dashboard

requirements.text: Store comprehensive user interaction data in the backend for every search session including: user name, user email, source city, destination city, generated package price, currency, initial satisfaction response (Yes/No), whether user opened Sarah AI (Yes/No), satisfaction after Sarah interaction (Yes/No), whether user proceeded to booking (Yes/No), and timestamp. This data must be persisted in backend storage and retrievable for analytics.

quotes: The backend must store the following data for every search session

User name, User email, Source city, Destination city, Generated package price, Currency, Was the user satisfied initially (Yes/No), Did the user open Sarah AI (Yes/No), Was the user satisfied after Sarah (Yes/No), Did the user proceed to booking (Yes/No), Timestamp

acceptanceCriteria: Backend captures all required fields for each search session
Data includes user details, package details, satisfaction metrics, AI interaction status, and booking status
Timestamp is stored for each session
Data is persisted in backend stable storage
Data can be queried and retrieved for display in admin panel

requirements.text: Display all stored user interaction data in the Admin Panel dashboard. Show analytics including: list of all search sessions with user details, package details, satisfaction metrics before and after Sarah interaction, AI usage statistics, and booking conversion data. Enable analysis to compare users satisfied without Sarah AI versus users satisfied after interacting with Sarah.

quotes: This information should appear in the Admin Panel dashboard
The admin dashboard must allow analysis of: Users satisfied without Sarah AI, Users satisfied after interacting with Sarah

acceptanceCriteria: Admin dashboard displays all tracked user interaction data
Data is presented in a clear, readable format
Dashboard shows satisfaction metrics before and after AI interaction
Admin can analyze correlation between Sarah AI usage and user satisfaction
Dashboard supports research objective of measuring AI influence on decision-making

requirements.text: Add support for Indian domestic travel routes including the following airports: Mumbai (BOM), Bangalore (BLR), Hyderabad (HYD), Delhi (DEL), Chennai (MAA), Goa (GOI), Vijayawada (VGA), Kolkata (CCU), Pune (PNQ), and Ahmedabad (AMD). Ensure searches work properly for all domestic route combinations such as Mumbai to Bangalore, Hyderabad to Goa, and Bangalore to Vijayawada.

quotes: Add support for Indian domestic routes including: Mumbai (BOM), Bangalore (BLR), Hyderabad (HYD), Delhi (DEL), Chennai (MAA), Goa (GOI), Vijayawada (VGA), Kolkata (CCU), Pune (PNQ), Ahmedabad (AMD)
Domestic searches such as: Mumbai → Bangalore, Hyderabad → Goa, Bangalore → Vijayawada must work properly

acceptanceCriteria: All 10 Indian airports are added to the cities/airports data
Users can search for any combination of domestic Indian routes
Search results are generated for Indian domestic routes
City autocomplete shows Indian cities with correct airport codes

requirements.text: Apply realistic pricing logic for Indian domestic travel. Use the following ranges: domestic India flights should cost between ₹3,000 and ₹9,000, and hotels should cost between ₹2,000 and ₹12,000 per night depending on tier. Ensure generated prices are realistic and fall within these ranges for Indian domestic routes.

quotes: Use realistic pricing ranges: Domestic India flights: ₹3000–₹9000, Hotels per night: ₹2000–₹12000
India domestic flights: ₹3000 – ₹9000, Hotels: ₹2000 – ₹12000 per night depending on tier

acceptanceCriteria: Domestic Indian flight prices range between ₹3,000 and ₹9,000
Hotel prices range between ₹2,000 and ₹12,000 per night
Pricing varies based on route, dates, and accommodation tier
Generated prices are realistic and not unrealistically high or low

requirements.text: Fix the 'Upgrade Package' button inside the Sarah chatbot. When clicked, Sarah should generate an upgraded package summary that adds 2-3 additional amenities (such as airport pickup, guided tour, breakfast, spa access, etc.) without changing the original package price. Display the upgraded package clearly to the user.

quotes: The Upgrade Package button inside the Sarah chatbot is not working
When clicked, Sarah should generate an upgraded package summary
Add 2–3 additional amenities (airport pickup, guided tour, breakfast, etc.)
Do not change the original package price

acceptanceCriteria: Upgrade Package button triggers Sarah to generate upgraded summary
Upgraded package includes 2-3 new amenities not in original package
Original package price remains unchanged
Upgraded amenities are relevant to the destination and travel type
Upgraded package is displayed clearly in the chat interface

requirements.text: Implement rule-based intelligent responses for Sarah chatbot using keyword detection and intent matching. Sarah should detect user requests and suggest contextual improvements based on keywords: 'beach activity' suggests water sports or beach tours, 'romantic experience' suggests candlelight dinner or sunset cruise, 'adventure' suggests trekking or adventure parks, 'local experience' suggests guided city tours. Sarah should add 2-3 value enhancements to the package while keeping price unchanged and present the upgraded package summary clearly.

quotes: Implement rule-based intelligent responses
Detect user intent using keyword matching
Generate contextual improvements based on: Destination, Travel type (beach / city / adventure), User request keywords
If user says: 'Add beach activity' → suggest water sports or beach tour
Sarah should: Add 2–3 value enhancements to the package, Keep price unchanged

acceptanceCriteria: Sarah analyzes user messages for keywords and intent
Sarah provides contextual suggestions based on detected keywords
Beach-related requests trigger water sports or beach activity suggestions
Romantic requests trigger dinner or cruise suggestions
Adventure requests trigger trekking or adventure park suggestions
Local experience requests trigger guided tour suggestions
Enhanced package includes 2-3 new amenities
Package price remains unchanged after enhancements
Sarah presents upgraded package summary clearly

requirements.text: Allow users to type custom requests in the Sarah chatbot interface. Sarah should respond contextually to user messages and suggest improvements to the package while keeping the price fixed. Implement text input functionality and message submission in the chat interface.

quotes: Allow users to type custom requests
Sarah should respond contextually and suggest improvements to the package while keeping the price fixed

acceptanceCriteria: Chat interface includes text input field for user messages
Users can type and submit custom requests
Sarah receives and processes user messages
Sarah responds contextually based on user input
Package enhancements maintain original price
Chat conversation flows naturally with user and assistant messages

requirements.text: Adjust satisfaction popup timing to ensure the first popup appears approximately 8 seconds after the user sees the package details (giving time to read), and the second satisfaction popup should only appear after Sarah finishes showing package improvements and the user has time to review the enhanced package.

quotes: Ensure the satisfaction popup appears only after the user has time to read the package details
First popup after ~8 seconds
Second popup only after Sarah finishes showing improvements

acceptanceCriteria: First satisfaction popup appears approximately 8 seconds after package details are displayed
User has sufficient time to read package before first popup
Second satisfaction popup only appears after Sarah interaction completes
Second popup timing accounts for Sarah displaying enhanced package
Popup timing feels natural and not intrusive to user experience

requirements.text: Track when users open Sarah AI chatbot and record this interaction in the analytics data. Update the session record to mark that the user engaged with Sarah (Did user open Sarah: Yes). Ensure this metric is captured before the user interacts with the chat to measure AI engagement rates.

quotes: Did the user open Sarah AI (Yes/No)
The admin dashboard must allow analysis of: Users satisfied without Sarah AI, Users satisfied after interacting with Sarah

acceptanceCriteria: When user opens Sarah chat popup, system records Sarah engagement
Analytics data includes 'Did user open Sarah' flag
Engagement is tracked before any chat interaction begins
Admin dashboard can differentiate between users who opened Sarah vs. those who did not

requirements.text: Track booking conversions in analytics data. When a user proceeds to the booking confirmation page or completes a booking, record this action in the session data (Did user proceed to booking: Yes). Ensure this metric is available in the admin dashboard for conversion analysis.

quotes: Did the user proceed to booking (Yes/No)
This will help evaluate whether AI improves user acceptance of travel packages

acceptanceCriteria: System tracks when user navigates to booking confirmation
Analytics data includes 'Did user proceed to booking' flag
Booking conversion is recorded in backend session data
Admin dashboard displays booking conversion rates
Booking data supports research analysis of AI impact on conversions

constraints: Do not use Internet Identity for admin authentication; implement simple username/password
Do not integrate with external LLM APIs; use rule-based keyword matching for Sarah responses
Admin credentials must be stored in backend configuration, not exposed in frontend code
Sarah AI enhancements must not change the original package price
System must support only one admin account for this MVP
All Indian domestic routes must use INR currency with realistic pricing ranges
nonGoals: Multi-admin user management or role-based access control
Integration with real LLM APIs like OpenAI or Anthropic
Real-time price updates from external travel APIs
International route pricing adjustments beyond existing logic
Advanced analytics visualizations beyond basic dashboard tables
Password reset or account recovery flows for admin
Support for additional currencies beyond those already implemented
